message:
fix: Preserve scroll position on theme change

Modified the theme update effect in useSequenceGrid to explicitly
capture and restore scroll position when theme changes. This prevents
the sequence view from resetting to position 0 during theme transitions.

The fix works by:
1. Capturing the current scroll position before applying the theme
2. Applying the new theme (colors, etc.)
3. Using requestAnimationFrame to restore scroll after render completes

Closes phage_explorer-0wq5
